On this page

移动端实现 (Mobile Implementations) ​

"OpenClaw的移动端实现采用了混合架构——原生平台能力 + Node.js 运行时，通过 OpenClawKit 桥接层连接。iOS 基于 SwiftUI 构建响应式 UI，Android 使用 Jetpack Compose 实现 Material Design，macOS 则融合了 SwiftUI 和 AppKit。这种设计既保证了原生性能，又实现了跨平台代码复用。卧槽，这个后台任务优化太细致了——iOS 的 BGTaskScheduler、Android 的 ForegroundService、macOS 的 LaunchAgent，每个平台都利用了系统能力来保证可靠性。"

核心技术洞察 ​

1. OpenClawKit 桥接层 ​

swift
// OpenClawKit (Swift 共享层)
public protocol OpenClawDelegate: AnyObject {
    func onMessageReceived(_ message: OpenClawMessage)
    func onGatewayConnected()
    func onGatewayDisconnected(error: Error?)
}

// JavaScript 桥接
@objc(OpenClawBridge)
public class OpenClawBridge: NSObject {
    private var nodeRuntime: NodeRuntime
    private weak var delegate: OpenClawDelegate?

    public func sendMessage(_ text: String, completion: @escaping (Bool) -> Void) {
        nodeRuntime.evaluateScript("sendMessage('\(text)')") { result in
            completion(result?.toBool() ?? false)
        }
    }
}

Leon点评：OpenClawKit 是整个移动端架构的核心：

  1. 统一 API：Swift 协议定义了所有平台共享的接口
  2. JavaScript 桥接：通过 Node.js 运行时执行 OpenClaw 核心代码
  3. 主线程安全：大量使用 @MainActor 确保 UI 更新在主线程
  4. 事件分发：将 Node.js 事件转换为 Swift 回调

2. iOS 后台任务优化 ​

swift
// apps/ios/BackgroundTasks.swift
import BackgroundTasks

class BackgroundTaskScheduler {
    func registerTasks() {
        // 注册网关心跳任务
        BGTaskScheduler.shared.register(
            forTaskWithIdentifier: "com.openclaw.gateway.heartbeat",
            using: nil
        ) { task in
            self.handleHeartbeatTask(task as! BGAppRefreshTask)
        }
    }

    private func handleHeartbeatTask(_ task: BGAppRefreshTask) {
        // 调度网关心跳
        gateway.sendHeartbeat()

        task.setTaskCompleted(success: true)
    }
}

Leon点评：iOS 后台任务利用了系统能力：

  1. BGTaskScheduler：iOS 13+ 的后台任务框架
  2. 心跳维护：定期发送心跳保持连接活跃
  3. 资源限制：系统限制后台执行时间和资源
  4. ** completion 处理**：正确报告任务完成状态

3. Android 前台服务 ​

kotlin
// apps/android/src/main/java/com/openclaw/GatewayService.kt
class GatewayService : Service() {
    private val binder = LocalBinder()

    override fun onStartCommand(intent: Intent?, flags: Int, startId: Int): Int {
        // 启动前台服务（显示通知）
        startForeground(NOTIFICATION_ID, createNotification())

        // 启动网关连接
        lifecycleScope.launch {
            gateway.connect()
        }

        return START_STICKY
    }

    inner class LocalBinder : Binder() {
        fun getService(): GatewayService = this@Service
    }
}

一、移动端架构总览 ​

平台特性对比 ​

特性iOSAndroidmacOS
UI 框架SwiftUIJetpack ComposeSwiftUI + AppKit
后台任务BGTaskSchedulerForegroundServiceLaunchAgent
推送通知APNsFCMAPNs
本地存储CoreData / UserDefaultsSQLite / SecurePrefsCoreData
网络通信URLSessionOkHttpURLSession

共享组件 ​

OpenClawKit (共享 Swift 代码)
├── Core/
│   ├── NodeRuntime.swift
│   ├── GatewayClient.swift
│   └── MessageStore.swift
├── UI/
│   ├── SwiftUI Views
│   └── Theme System
└── Platform/
    ├── iOS/
    ├── Android/
    └── macOS/

二、关键技术实现 ​

网关发现机制 ​

swift
// iOS 网关发现
func discoverGateway() async -> URL? {
    // 1. 尝试本地网络发现
    if let localURL = await discoverLocalGateway() {
        return localURL
    }

    // 2. 尝试云端网关
    if let cloudURL = await discoverCloudGateway() {
        return cloudURL
    }

    return nil
}

状态管理模式 ​

swift
// apps/ios/ViewModels/GatewayViewModel.swift
@MainActor
class GatewayViewModel: ObservableObject {
    @Published var connectionState: ConnectionState = .disconnected
    @Published var lastError: Error?

    private let gateway: GatewayClient

    func connect() async {
        connectionState = .connecting

        do {
            try await gateway.connect()
            connectionState = .connected
        } catch {
            self.lastError = error
            connectionState = .failed(error)
        }
    }
}

三、iOS 实现细节 ​

SwiftUI 架构 ​

swift
// apps/ios/Sources/OpenClaw/ContentView.swift
import SwiftUI

struct ContentView: View {
    @StateObject private var gatewayViewModel = GatewayViewModel()
    @StateObject private var chatViewModel = ChatViewModel()

    var body: some View {
        VStack {
            if gatewayViewModel.connectionState == .connected {
                ChatView(viewModel: chatViewModel)
            } else {
                ConnectionPromptView(viewModel: gatewayViewModel)
            }
        }
        .task {
            await gatewayViewModel.connect()
        }
    }
}

后台任务优化 ​

swift
// apps/ios/Sources/OpenClaw/BackgroundTasks.swift
import BackgroundTasks

class BackgroundTaskScheduler {
    func registerTasks() {
        // 注册网关心跳任务
        BGTaskScheduler.shared.register(
            forTaskWithIdentifier: "com.openclaw.gateway.heartbeat",
            using: nil
        ) { task in
            self.handleHeartbeatTask(task as! BGAppRefreshTask)
        }

        // 注册会话同步任务
        BGTaskScheduler.shared.register(
            forTaskWithIdentifier: "com.openclaw.session.sync",
            using: nil
        ) { task in
            self.handleSessionSyncTask(task as! BGProcessingTask)
        }
    }

    private func handleHeartbeatTask(_ task: BGAppRefreshTask) {
        // 调度网关心跳
        gateway.sendHeartbeat()

        // 设置下次任务
        scheduleNextHeartbeat()

        task.setTaskCompleted(success: true)
    }
}

状态管理 ​

swift
// apps/ios/Sources/OpenClaw/ViewModels/GatewayViewModel.swift
@MainActor
class GatewayViewModel: ObservableObject {
    @Published var connectionState: ConnectionState = .disconnected
    @Published var lastError: Error?
    @Published var gatewayInfo: GatewayInfo?

    private let gateway: GatewayClient

    init() {
        self.gateway = GatewayClient()
    }

    func connect() async {
        connectionState = .connecting

        do {
            try await gateway.connect()
            connectionState = .connected
        } catch {
            self.lastError = error
            connectionState = .failed(error)
        }
    }
}

四、Android 实现细节 ​

Jetpack Compose 架构 ​

kotlin
// apps/android/src/main/java/com/openclaw/ui/MainScreen.kt
@Composable
fun MainScreen(
    gatewayViewModel: GatewayViewModel = viewModel(),
    chatViewModel: ChatViewModel = viewModel()
) {
    val connectionState by gatewayViewModel.connectionState.collectAsState()

    when (connectionState) {
        ConnectionState.CONNECTED -> {
            ChatScreen(viewModel = chatViewModel)
        }
        else -> {
            ConnectionPromptScreen(
                viewModel = gatewayViewModel,
                onConnect = { gatewayViewModel.connect() }
            )
        }
    }
}

前台服务 ​

kotlin
// apps/android/src/main/java/com/openclaw/GatewayService.kt
class GatewayService : Service() {
    private val binder = LocalBinder()
    private val scope = CoroutineScope(Dispatchers.IO)

    override fun onStartCommand(intent: Intent?, flags: Int, startId: Int): Int {
        // 启动前台服务（显示通知）
        startForeground(NOTIFICATION_ID, createNotification())

        // 启动网关连接
        scope.launch {
            gateway.connect()
        }

        return START_STICKY
    }

    inner class LocalBinder : Binder() {
        fun getService(): GatewayService = this@Service
    }
}

网关发现 ​

kotlin
// apps/android/src/main/java/com/openclaw/discovery/GatewayDiscovery.kt
suspend fun discoverGateway(): URI? {
    // 1. 尝试本地网络发现
    val localUrl = discoverLocalGateway()
    if (localUrl != null) return localUrl

    // 2. 尝试云端网关
    val cloudUrl = discoverCloudGateway()
    if (cloudUrl != null) return cloudUrl

    // 3. 尝试 Tailscale
    val tailscaleUrl = discoverTailscaleGateway()
    if (tailscaleUrl != null) return tailscaleUrl

    return null
}

五、macOS 实现细节 ​

混合架构 ​

swift
// apps/macos/Sources/OpenClaw/AppDelegate.swift
import Cocoa
import SwiftUI

@NSApplicationMain
class AppDelegate: NSObject, NSApplicationDelegate {
    var window: NSWindow!
    var statusItem: NSStatusItem?

    func applicationDidFinishLaunching(_ notification: Notification) {
        // 创建主窗口
        window = NSWindow(
            contentRect: NSRect(x: 0, y: 0, width: 800, height: 600),
            styleMask: [.titled, .closable, .miniaturizable, .resizable],
            backing: .buffered,
            defer: false
        )
        window.center()

        // 创建 SwiftUI 视图
        let contentView = ContentView()
        window.contentViewController = NSHostingController(rootView: contentView)

        // 创建菜单栏图标
        setupStatusBarItem()
    }

    func setupStatusBarItem() {
        statusItem = NSStatusBar.system.statusItem(withLength: NSStatusItem.variableLength)
        statusItem?.button?.title = "OpenClaw"

        let menu = NSMenu()
        menu.addItem(NSMenuItem(title: "Show", action: #selector(showWindow), keyEquivalent: ""))
        menu.addItem(NSMenuItem.separator())
        menu.addItem(NSMenuItem(title: "Quit", action: #selector(terminate), keyEquivalent: "q"))

        statusItem?.menu = menu
    }
}

LaunchAgent 集成 ​

xml
<!-- apps/macos/Resources/com.openclaw.launchd.plist -->
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
<plist version="1.0">
<dict>
    <key>Label</key>
    <string>com.openclaw.gateway</string>
    <key>ProgramArguments</key>
    <array>
        <string>/Applications/OpenClaw.app/Contents/MacOS/OpenClaw</string>
        <string>--gateway</string>
    </array>
    <key>RunAtLoad</key>
    <true/>
    <key>KeepAlive</key>
    <true/>
</dict>
</plist>

六、网关发现机制 ​

多层次发现策略 ​

swift
// OpenClawKit/Core/GatewayDiscovery.swift
public enum GatewayDiscovery {
    public static func discover() async throws -> URL {
        // 1. 显式配置
        if let configuredUrl = loadConfiguredURL() {
            return configuredUrl
        }

        // 2. 本地网络扫描
        if let localUrl = await scanLocalNetwork() {
            return localUrl
        }

        // 3. Tailscale MagicDNS
        if let tailscaleUrl = await resolveTailscaleMagicDNS() {
            return tailscaleUrl
        }

        // 4. 云端网关
        if let cloudUrl = loadCloudURL() {
            return cloudUrl
        }

        throw GatewayDiscoveryError.notFound
    }
}

WebSocket 连接管理 ​

swift
// OpenClawKit/Core/GatewayClient.swift
public class GatewayClient: NSObject, WebSocketDelegate {
    private var socket: WebSocket?
    private var isConnected = false

    public func connect(to url: URL) async throws {
        let request = URLRequest(url: url)
        socket = WebSocket(request: request)
        socket?.delegate = self
        socket?.resume()
    }

    public func didReceive(event: WebSocketEvent, client: WebSocket) {
        switch event {
        case .connected:
            isConnected = true
            delegate?.gatewayDidConnect()

        case .disconnected(let reason, let code):
            isConnected = false
            delegate?.gatewayDidDisconnect(reason: reason, code: code)

        case .text(let message):
            handleMessage(message)

        case .binary(let data):
            handleBinaryData(data)

        default:
            break
        }
    }
}

七、技术权衡 ​

1. 原生 vs 跨平台框架 ​

方案优势劣势
原生最佳性能、完整 API开发成本高
React Native跨平台、热更新性能损失、包体积大

选择：原生 原因：需要深度集成系统功能（后台任务、推送通知）

2. 混合架构 ​

组件技术选型
UI原生 (SwiftUI / Jetpack Compose)
逻辑OpenClawKit (Swift) + OpenClaw Core (JS)
桥接Node.js Mobile

原因：原生 UI 提供最佳体验，JS 核心实现代码复用

3. 后台任务策略 ​

平台策略限制
iOSBGTaskScheduler最多 1 分钟 / 天
AndroidForegroundService需要持久通知
macOSLaunchAgent无执行时间限制

选择：各平台使用最优策略 原因：系统限制不同，无法使用统一方案

本文档基于源码分析，涵盖 OpenClawKit 桥接、后台任务优化、状态管理、网关发现机制以及技术权衡。
